behaviors.behavior: AC1: classify_complexity STDOUT is byte-identical with vs without --run-id (same project-root)
AC1: --run-id persists <run_id>.plan.json under .shipwright/agent_docs/iterates/ with the 5-key shape
AC1: no --run-id writes no plan file (graceful degradation / write-on-touch)
AC1: persisted complexity/risk_flags equal the stdout JSON estimate/risk_flags (projection is stdout-derived)
AC2: build_session_plan returns {run_id,complexity,risk_flags,phases,skips}; phases/skips disjoint & well-shaped
Projection: medium + risk flag plans all reviews (external_plan_review/code_review/confidence_calibration)
Projection: trivial + no risk skips interview/iterate_spec/reviews with non-empty reasons
Projection: small + touches_io_boundary keeps confidence_calibration + code_review planned
Projection: small + non-io risk (touches_auth) keeps code_review but SKIPS calibration (io-boundary-specific rule)
Round-trip (producer->file->consumer): json.loads readback equals build_session_plan output
Plan file lands at .shipwright/agent_docs/iterates/<run_id>.plan.json
Boundary co-tenancy: plan files alone yield no history prior (never counted as finalized entries)
Boundary co-tenancy: adding plan files never shifts an existing history prior
Security: a crafted run_id (../../evil) stays contained under the iterates dir
Fail-soft: persist_session_plan_safe swallows OSError (returns None, never aborts the session)
Robustness: a partial result (missing estimate) defaults complexity=trivial, risk_flags=[]
FIX 1: external PLAN review is §6 medium+ (auto) only — SKIPPED at trivial/small even WITH a risk flag (io/auth), which floor to small
FIX 2: the projection matches the NORMATIVE §6 Phase Matrix across trivial/small/medium x {no-risk, generic-risk, touches_io_boundary} (drift guard)
confidence_calibration is §6-exact: skipped at trivial (any risk), planned at small only for touches_io_boundary, planned at medium+
FIX 3: persist_session_plan validates run_id against RUN_ID_STRICT and raises ValueError on a malformed run_id (traversal/NUL/non-canonical)
FIX 3: persist_session_plan_safe is fail-soft for OSError/ValueError/TypeError (malformed run_id, NUL, None project_root) — returns None, writes nothing
FIX 4: plan_path keeps crafted run_ids (../.., absolute, C:\ drive-letter, a/b/c) contained under the iterates dir
FIX 4: the .gitignore carries the /.shipwright/agent_docs/iterates/*.plan.json rule (plan file stays gitignored)
